content:
🌟 mxFind | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Discovering and searching public Matrix chat rooms across different homeservers.
✨ Key Features: • Search public Matrix rooms via `/_matrix/client/v3/publicRooms` • Query multiple configured homeservers • Store room metadata in a local SQLite index • Use local search by default when the database exists • Force live search when needed
📖 Summary: mxfind is a Rust-based command-line and terminal UI tool designed to discover public Matrix chat rooms. It allows users to query multiple Matrix homeservers, build a local SQLite index for fast searching, and output results in both human-readable and machine-readable JSON formats.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
